text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I did it! I didn't sully the title of model student! A
superhuman force! MEGA BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No need to hold back! Go ahead and shower me
with praise!
choice_data_list: A champion can go even faster!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Being able to run spectacularly is the foundation
of being the class representative after all!
choice_data_list: Do your best in the next one, too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Leave it to me! The legendary genius,
Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let's aim for victory together! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wowza! But you think I got what it takes to be a
champion?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Basically you're telling me how much you believe
in my next victory, right? Right?!
choice_data_list:
Well, it's more that there's still room for
improvement.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! As a genius, it would be an embarrassment
if I couldn't live up to your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Come wind or rain! Or even the fires of hell! I will
Bakushin to victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I meant something different, it
appears to have had a positive effect on Sakura
Bakushin O.
